text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's okay... Spider cartoons and spider plushies are
cute, so I should be fine seeing the real thing
too... if it's cute!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... Okay. "Cute spider." Search. I can do this... I can do this... Ei, ei, mu—eeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why?! I typed in "cute," but they're not cute
at a—wait, no. I'm sure if I look closely enough,
I'll see the cute... agh, the horrors!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Nya?! O-oh no... I'm feeling weak... S-someone,
help meee!
